name: Goldsource Mines Inc.
description: Goldsource Mines Inc. is a Canadian resource company engaged in exploration and development activities. The company's primary focus is on its 100%-owned Eagle Mountain Gold Project in Guyana, South America, where it is working to expand resources and advance the project toward potential low-cost production. Goldsource is led by an experienced management team with a track record of discovery and building operating mines in the Americas.
